NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF (TRANSACTION ID # 43676775) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROYAL, LESTER ROYAL, ELLA HEARING SET FOR MAY-10-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 503
CONDITIONAL NON-OPPO TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IN TRIAL SETTING (TRANSACTION ID # 43776270) FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PER C.C.P. 36(A). TRIAL IS SEPTEMBER 4, 2012 AT 11:15AM IN DEPARTMENT 503. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY MOTIONS IS AUGUST 23. PLAINTIFFS HAVE STIPULATED THAT SUMMARY MOTIONS MAY BE HEARD ON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. THE LAST DAY TO HEAR SUMMARY MOTIONS REMAINS AUGUST 23, WITH OPPOSITIONS DUE FIVE COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND REPLIES DUE TWO COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PLAINTIFFS TO MAKE A SETTLEMENT DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN AUGUST 6, 2012. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30PM ON AUGUST 23, 2012. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS AUGUST 17, 2012. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS AUGUST 31, 2012. NO LATER THAN JUNE 1, 2012, PLAINTIFFS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS. NO LATER THAN JUNE 1, 2012, DEFENDANTS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ANY PERSON NOT IDENTIFIED ON THE STATEMENTS WILL BE BARRED FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL OR PRESENTING A DECLARATION ON A SUMMARY MOTION ABSENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ANY OTHER SCHEDULING OR OTHER ISSUE WHICH ANY OF THEM WANT TO HAVE INCLUDED IN THE PREFERENCE ORDER. FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUGUST 8, 2012 AT 1:30PM. NO NEED FOR ANY PARTY TO FILE ANY CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT. PARTIES MAY APPEAR AT THE CONFERENCE BY TELEPHONE. THERE WILL BE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULES OF COURT RULE 5 AND THE DATE OF THIS CONFERENCE WILL BE PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES BY THE COURT AT A LATER DATE. THE PARTIES SHALL COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 5.0. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS, REPORTER: PATRICIA RODRIGUEZ, CSR #12436 (503/SRB)
